allow: Bash(npx --no-install --yes -p @babel/parser@^7 -e 'const p=require\("@babel/parser"\); const fs=require\("fs"\); for \(const f of ["client/src/pages/AdminPremium.js","client/src/pages/Admin.js","client/src/components/TableGrid.js","client/src/components/Daybook.js","client/src/components/PaymentQRModal.js"]\) { try { p.parse\(fs.readFileSync\(f,"utf8"\),{sourceType:"module",plugins:["jsx"]}\); console.log\(f,"OK"\); } catch\(e\){ console.log\(f,"FAIL",e.message\); } }')

Bash(node -e 'const p=require\("@babel/parser"\); const fs=require\("fs"\); for \(const f of ["src/pages/AdminPremium.js","src/pages/Admin.js","src/components/TableGrid.js","src/components/Daybook.js","src/components/PaymentQRModal.js"]\) { try { p.parse\(fs.readFileSync\(f,"utf8"\),{sourceType:"module",plugins:["jsx"]}\); console.log\(f,"OK"\); } catch\(e\){ console.log\(f,"FAIL",e.message\); } }')
